TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Salafi'iay_a_maci', title = Salafi'iay_a_maci', year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Salafi'iay_a_maci'} }

S.FORM: Micelem to ko cidal. Satapan to misiwfay. Alatek paliwar to sama`ama`anay a dafong.Ira ko riko, taka`enan , tasalamaan kahilahilasan. O Ka fa`edetay a kitakit o tadama`anay a pisalamaan konini. Pisiwfay a demak ira ko tosa a sasiloma : Saka cecay padetehan a misimsim ko pisiwfayan a maci`. Nolate noniyah a loma. Haca o micaliwwan a loma' hapisiwfayan. Salafi`ifi`sa ko pi siwfay. Irasato Patongalhan pacafay to kapahay no niyalo a mono . Saka tosa i cecay a lipay anga misiwfay. Tora sakaenem, sakapito no lipay. Mikihamonay a siwfay a tamdaw masa`opo malacafay mapolon ko tayal sali- naxlinaxsa ko niyalo a paliwal cangra. Salafi'iay a ma`ci i tiya micelem to ko cidal misatapan to pisiwfay paliwar. Kapahanhan to ko matayalay a tamdaw malacafay to idan noratek mapolon ko palo no loma' hakelonsa misalama mi'aca. O:rato Paliwal a dafon kahilahilaan soto. No fa`inayan fafahiyan a rik`o,koco', fati, cangaw , sapi`ino`asikin ,taka`enan,sakatayar a lalosidan,tasalama`an..... kahilahilasaca. I tini sa Taywan salafi`iay a maci hananay a dihay ko sama`ama`anay a dafon kahilahilasa`an ko paliwaran . O siykac` no tamdw. Cowa ka sasawaden a pinangan koni. Masalafiiay a Kalali'acaan-夜市 Celem saho ku cidal makakerekrem ku dadaya, mararawrawtu ku salawacan nu Maci , 'alumantu ku miparayrayay a patala tu sapa'aca. Palitmek a misilsil tu sapa'aca nu tireng paysa'ayaw. Ira ku cipararay, ira ku teli sanay i sasra, ira ku i palidingay a maca'it. Nikawrira, muecel ku parayray a masatisil; kakahad ku kasala'ela'ed nangra, fangcal ku karumakatan nu lafang. Tu'eman satu sataengad sa ku simal, matiya u rumi'ad ku pinengneng mahapi:nang, itiyatu haw i, naicuwacuwaay a tamdaw malisafuntu a tayni minengneng tu nafalucu'an nu tireng itu palitmek.Itini caay kapipadeteng a mirikec tu karumakatan, paka'ayaw kanca pakaikur a misitapang ma^min a manga'ay, pakawanantu , pakawilitu awa ku sumuwalay. Nawhani, u hanhaenay aca ku pinangan tu nanu 'aya'ayaw. Saka 'a'ecu'ecu satu, mi'isir tu tatirengan rara han mituur ku ka'ayaway a rumakat. U tamdaw ku saka ira nu paysu, awaen nu tamdaw awa ku paysu, unian ku saka^ca ka latu'nu matiniay a tayal, unian ku mituka'ay cangranan u mipaliwalay. Itini i Tayciw, adihay ku miingiday tu Maci a umah, u paka^sesay a tamdaw i, palasawad han ningraa ku lima fakciw nu facal a mi'amutu misapaenan, malu sapipatireng tu pisiwfayan tu dadayaay; cila satu, mapatirengtu ku lawalawac nu sra ningra tu takaraway luma', malecadaytu a macakat ku 'aca nu sra ningra. Ka'inalan a minengneng ku matiniay a tayal hantu, nikawrira cima ku mafana'ay tu ruray nangra hakiya. Caho kapicelem ku cidal misakimukimur itu, maupuh miparayray tudafung a mipatala tu lafang; ya hinatala tu sakairaaw atu mi'em'em tu sakafuti'aw, tahira i lafii tusa ku tuki; ta nukay sa mafuti'. Anu pararirsa i ngata nu luma' ku pa'acaan manga'ayho, mafalic tu dadayadaya ku pipa'acaan,alatek fesiwsa tayra i Singciku ,lafii patikul minukay tayni Tauciw. Caay ka cifalucu' atu caay pakahadidi a tamdaw tangsultu misawad tu matiniay a tayal. Dengan u 'urad ku mamitena' tu falucu' nangra, u misalinalinahay a siwfay kuninian. Adihay i tokay ku misiwfayay, ira ku nu tireng a luma'ira ku micaliwan a luma'tu malu tiyam . Maru'ay tuya ccay a lalan, malecad ku kasasuwal nangra a tahira i lafii ku pisiwfay; patungal han nu i lalanay miparayray, ma:ngalef ku ka'aluman nu tamdaw a miraur. Ruma, ira ku pataduan nu Cenfu ku pisalamaan a kalali'acaan tu dadaya, caliw han nu 'alumanay; nika u facu ningra caay ka sasiruma tuna misuwalan tu i ka'ayaway. Tapal han a minangneng ku pa'acaan nu matiniay a pisiwfay i, masalalekuan itini i 'urip ita tu rumi'ami'ad. U Ca'dung, Kakaenen, Sakiluma'atu masamaamaanay a sasalamaen makayrayra itini, anu awawaay i , palatawa hantu pasuwal "Idahi tu nika awa"! Nawhani, aniniay a pisiyakayan i, tada awaaytu ku rumi'ad a mi'aca tu 'a'acaen aca; kanga'ayan ira ku matiniay "Masalafiiay a kalali'acaan".
S.PHON: miʦəɾəm to~u ko~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ. satapan to~u misiwfaj. aɾatək paɾiwar to~u sama`ama`anaj a ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ.ira ko~u riko~u, taka`ənan , tasaɾamaan kaħiɾaħiɾasan. o~u ka fa`əɬ~ɮətaj a kitakit o~u taɬ~ɮama`anaj a pisaɾamaan ko~unini. pisiwfaj a ɬ~ɮəmak ira ko~u to~usa a sasiɾo~uma : saka ʦəʦaj paɬ~ɮətəħan a misimsim ko~u pisiwfajan a maʦi`. no~uɾatə no~unijaħ a ɾo~uma. ħaʦa o~u miʦaɾiwwan a ɾo~umaʡ ħapisiwfajan. saɾafi`ifi`sa ko~u pi siwfaj. irasato~u pato~uŋaɾħan paʦafaj to~u kapaħaj no~u nijaɾo~u a mo~uno~u . saka to~usa i ʦəʦaj a ɾipaj aŋa misiwfaj. to~ura sakaənəm, sakapito~u no~u ɾipaj. mikiħamo~unaj a siwfaj a tamɬ~ɮaw masa`o~upo~u maɾaʦafaj mapo~uɾo~un ko~u tajaɾ saɾi- naxɾinaxsa ko~u nijaɾo~u a paɾiwaɾ ʦaŋra. saɾafiʡiaj a ma`ʦi i tija miʦəɾəm to~u ko~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ misatapan to~u pisiwfaj paɾiwar. kapaħanħan to~u ko~u matajaɾaj a tamɬ~ɮaw maɾaʦafaj to~u iɬ~ɮan no~uratək mapo~uɾo~un ko~u paɾo~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ ħakəɾo~unsa misaɾama miʡaʦa. o~u:rato~u paɾiwaɾ a ɬ~ɮafo~un kaħiɾaħiɾaan so~uto~u. no~u fa`inajan fafaħijan a rik`o~u,ko~uʦo~uʡ, fati, ʦaŋaw , sapi`ino~u`asikin ,taka`ənan,sakatajar a ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan,tasaɾama`an..... kaħiɾaħiɾasaʦa. i tini sa tajwan saɾafi`iaj a maʦi ħananaj a ɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u sama`ama`anaj a ɬ~ɮafo~un kaħiɾaħiɾasa`an ko~u paɾiwaran . o~u sijkaʦ` no~u tamɬ~ɮw. ʦo~uwa ka sasawaɬ~ɮən a pinaŋan ko~uni. masaɾafiiaj a kaɾaɾiʡaʦaan-** ʦəɾəm saħo~u ko~u~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ makakərəkrəm ko~u~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja, mararawrawto~u~u ko~u~u saɾawaʦan no~u~u maʦi , ʡaɾo~u~umanto~u~u ko~u~u miparajrajaj a pataɾa to~u~u sapaʡaʦa. paɾitmək a misiɾsiɾ to~u~u sapaʡaʦa no~u~u tirəŋ pajsaʡajaw. ira ko~u~u ʦipararaj, ira ko~u~u təɾi sanaj i sasra, ira ko~u~u i paɾiɬ~ɮiŋaj a maʦaʡit. nikawrira, mo~u~uəʦəɾ ko~u~u parajraj a masatisiɾ; kakaħaɬ~ɮ ko~u~u kasaɾaʡəɾaʡəɬ~ɮ naŋra, faŋʦaɾ ko~u~u karo~u~umakatan no~u~u ɾafaŋ. to~u~uʡəman sato~u~u sataəŋaɬ~ɮ sa ko~u~u simaɾ, matija o~u~u ro~u~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ko~u~u pinəŋnəŋ maħapi:naŋ, itijato~u~u ħaw i, naiʦo~u~uwaʦo~u~uwaaj a tamɬ~ɮaw maɾisafo~u~unto~u~u a tajni minəŋnəŋ to~u~u nafaɾo~u~uʦo~u~uʡan no~u~u tirəŋ ito~u~u paɾitmək.itini ʦaaj kapipaɬ~ɮətəŋ a mirikəʦ to~u~u karo~u~umakatan, pakaʡajaw kanʦa pakaiko~u~ur a misitapaŋ maʔmin a maŋaʡaj, pakawananto~u~u , pakawiɾito~u~u awa ko~u~u so~u~umo~u~uwaɾaj. nawħani, o~u~u ħanħaənaj aʦa ko~u~u pinaŋan to~u~u nano~u~u ʡajaʡajaw. saka ʡaʡəʦo~u~uʡəʦo~u~u sato~u~u, miʡisir to~u~u tatirəŋan rara ħan mito~u~uo~u~ur ko~u~u kaʡajawaj a ro~u~umakat. o~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u~u saka ira no~u~u pajso~u~u, awaən no~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw awa ko~u~u pajso~u~u, o~u~unian ko~u~u sakaʔʦa ka ɾato~u~uʡno~u~u matiniaj a tajaɾ, o~u~unian ko~u~u mito~u~ukaʡaj ʦaŋranan o~u~u mipaɾiwaɾaj. itini i tajʦiw, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u~u miiŋiɬ~ɮaj to~u~u maʦi a o~u~umaħ, o~u~u pakaʔsəsaj a tamɬ~ɮaw i, paɾasawaɬ~ɮ ħan niŋraa ko~u~u ɾima fakʦiw no~u~u faʦaɾ a miʡamo~u~uto~u~u misapaənan, maɾo~u~u sapipatirəŋ to~u~u pisiwfajan to~u~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮajaaj; ʦiɾa sato~u~u, mapatirəŋto~u~u ko~u~u ɾawaɾawaʦ no~u~u sra niŋra to~u~u takarawaj ɾo~u~umaʡ, maɾəʦaɬ~ɮajto~u~u a maʦakat ko~u~u ʡaʦa no~u~u sra niŋra. kaʡinaɾan a minəŋnəŋ ko~u~u matiniaj a tajaɾ ħanto~u~u, nikawrira ʦima ko~u~u mafanaʡaj to~u~u ro~u~uraj naŋra ħakija. ʦaħo~u kapiʦəɾəm ko~u~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ misakimo~u~ukimo~u~ur ito~u~u, mao~u~upo~u~uħ miparajraj to~u~uɬ~ɮafo~u~uŋ a mipataɾa to~u~u ɾafaŋ; ja ħinataɾa to~u~u sakairaaw ato~u~u miʡəmʡəm to~u~u sakafo~u~utiʡaw, taħira i ɾafii to~u~usa ko~u~u to~u~uki; ta no~u~ukaj sa mafo~u~utiʡ. ano~u~u pararirsa i ŋata no~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡ ko~u~u paʡaʦaan maŋaʡajħo~u, mafaɾiʦ to~u~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮajaɬ~ɮaja ko~u~u pipaʡaʦaan,aɾatək fəsiwsa tajra i siŋʦiko~u~u ,ɾafii patiko~u~uɾ mino~u~ukaj tajni tao~u~uʦiw. ʦaaj ka ʦifaɾo~u~uʦo~u~uʡ ato~u~u ʦaaj pakaħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi a tamɬ~ɮaw taŋso~u~uɾto~u~u misawaɬ~ɮ to~u~u matiniaj a tajaɾ. ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u~u ʡo~u~uraɬ~ɮ ko~u~u mamitənaʡ to~u~u faɾo~u~uʦo~u~uʡ naŋra, o~u~u misaɾinaɾinaħaj a siwfaj ko~u~uninian. aɬ~ɮiħaj i to~ukaj ko~u~u misiwfajaj, ira ko~u~u no~u~u tirəŋ a ɾo~u~umaʡira ko~u~u miʦaɾiwan a ɾo~u~umaʡto~u~u maɾo~u~u tijam . maro~u~uʡaj to~u~uja ʦʦaj a ɾaɾan, maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u~u kasaso~u~uwaɾ naŋra a taħira i ɾafii ko~u~u pisiwfaj; pato~u~uŋaɾ ħan no~u~u i ɾaɾanaj miparajraj, ma:ŋaɾəf ko~u~u kaʡaɾo~u~uman no~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw a mirao~u~ur. ro~u~uma, ira ko~u~u pataɬ~ɮo~u~uan no~u~u ʦənfo~u~u ko~u~u pisaɾamaan a kaɾaɾiʡaʦaan to~u~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja, ʦaɾiw ħan no~u~u ʡaɾo~u~umanaj; nika o~u~u faʦo~u~u niŋra ʦaaj ka sasiro~u~uma to~u~una miso~u~uwaɾan to~u~u i kaʡajawaj. tapaɾ ħan a minaŋnəŋ ko~u~u paʡaʦaan no~u~u matiniaj a pisiwfaj i, masaɾaɾəko~u~uan itini i ʡo~u~urip ita to~u~u ro~u~umiʡamiʡaɬ~ɮ. o~u~u ʦaʡɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ, kakaənən, sakiɾo~u~umaʡato~u~u masamaamaanaj a sasaɾamaən makajrajra itini, ano~u~u awawaaj i , paɾatawa ħanto~u~u paso~u~uwaɾ "iɬ~ɮaħi to~u~u nika awa"! nawħani, aniniaj a pisijakajan i, taɬ~ɮa awaajto~u~u ko~u~u ro~u~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a miʡaʦa to~u~u ʡaʡaʦaən aʦa; kaŋaʡajan ira ko~u~u matiniaj "masaɾafiiaj a kaɾaɾiʡaʦaan".
S.FORM: Micelem to ko cidal. Satapan to misiwfay. Alatek paliwar to sama`ama`anay a dafong.Ira ko riko, taka`enan , tasalamaan kahilahilasan. O Ka fa`edetay a kitakit o tadama`anay a pisalamaan konini. Pisiwfay a demak ira ko tosa a sasiloma : Saka cecay padetehan a misimsim ko pisiwfayan a maci`. Nolate noniyah a loma. Haca o micaliwwan a loma' hapisiwfayan. Salafi`ifi`sa ko pi siwfay. Irasato Patongalhan pacafay to kapahay no niyalo a mono . Saka tosa i cecay a lipay anga misiwfay. Tora sakaenem, sakapito no lipay. Mikihamonay a siwfay a tamdaw masa`opo malacafay mapolon ko tayal sali- naxlinaxsa ko niyalo a paliwal cangra. Salafi'iay a ma`ci i tiya micelem to ko cidal misatapan to pisiwfay paliwar. Kapahanhan to ko matayalay a tamdaw malacafay to idan noratek mapolon ko palo no loma' hakelonsa misalama mi'aca. O:rato Paliwal a dafon kahilahilaan soto. No fa`inayan fafahiyan a rik`o,koco', fati, cangaw , sapi`ino`asikin ,taka`enan,sakatayar a lalosidan,tasalama`an..... kahilahilasaca. I tini sa Taywan salafi`iay a maci hananay a dihay ko sama`ama`anay a dafon kahilahilasa`an ko paliwaran . O siykac` no tamdw. Cowa ka sasawaden a pinangan koni. Masalafiiay a Kalali'acaan-夜市 Celem saho ku cidal makakerekrem ku dadaya, mararawrawtu ku salawacan nu Maci , 'alumantu ku miparayrayay a patala tu sapa'aca. Palitmek a misilsil tu sapa'aca nu tireng paysa'ayaw. Ira ku cipararay, ira ku teli sanay i sasra, ira ku i palidingay a maca'it. Nikawrira, muecel ku parayray a masatisil; kakahad ku kasala'ela'ed nangra, fangcal ku karumakatan nu lafang. Tu'eman satu sataengad sa ku simal, matiya u rumi'ad ku pinengneng mahapi:nang, itiyatu haw i, naicuwacuwaay a tamdaw malisafuntu a tayni minengneng tu nafalucu'an nu tireng itu palitmek.Itini caay kapipadeteng a mirikec tu karumakatan, paka'ayaw kanca pakaikur a misitapang ma^min a manga'ay, pakawanantu , pakawilitu awa ku sumuwalay. Nawhani, u hanhaenay aca ku pinangan tu nanu 'aya'ayaw. Saka 'a'ecu'ecu satu, mi'isir tu tatirengan rara han mituur ku ka'ayaway a rumakat. U tamdaw ku saka ira nu paysu, awaen nu tamdaw awa ku paysu, unian ku saka^ca ka latu'nu matiniay a tayal, unian ku mituka'ay cangranan u mipaliwalay. Itini i Tayciw, adihay ku miingiday tu Maci a umah, u paka^sesay a tamdaw i, palasawad han ningraa ku lima fakciw nu facal a mi'amutu misapaenan, malu sapipatireng tu pisiwfayan tu dadayaay; cila satu, mapatirengtu ku lawalawac nu sra ningra tu takaraway luma', malecadaytu a macakat ku 'aca nu sra ningra. Ka'inalan a minengneng ku matiniay a tayal hantu, nikawrira cima ku mafana'ay tu ruray nangra hakiya. Caho kapicelem ku cidal misakimukimur itu, maupuh miparayray tudafung a mipatala tu lafang; ya hinatala tu sakairaaw atu mi'em'em tu sakafuti'aw, tahira i lafii tusa ku tuki; ta nukay sa mafuti'. Anu pararirsa i ngata nu luma' ku pa'acaan manga'ayho, mafalic tu dadayadaya ku pipa'acaan,alatek fesiwsa tayra i Singciku ,lafii patikul minukay tayni Tauciw. Caay ka cifalucu' atu caay pakahadidi a tamdaw tangsultu misawad tu matiniay a tayal. Dengan u 'urad ku mamitena' tu falucu' nangra, u misalinalinahay a siwfay kuninian. Adihay i tokay ku misiwfayay, ira ku nu tireng a luma'ira ku micaliwan a luma'tu malu tiyam . Maru'ay tuya ccay a lalan, malecad ku kasasuwal nangra a tahira i lafii ku pisiwfay; patungal han nu i lalanay miparayray, ma:ngalef ku ka'aluman nu tamdaw a miraur. Ruma, ira ku pataduan nu Cenfu ku pisalamaan a kalali'acaan tu dadaya, caliw han nu 'alumanay; nika u facu ningra caay ka sasiruma tuna misuwalan tu i ka'ayaway. Tapal han a minangneng ku pa'acaan nu matiniay a pisiwfay i, masalalekuan itini i 'urip ita tu rumi'ami'ad. U Ca'dung, Kakaenen, Sakiluma'atu masamaamaanay a sasalamaen makayrayra itini, anu awawaay i , palatawa hantu pasuwal "Idahi tu nika awa"! Nawhani, aniniay a pisiyakayan i, tada awaaytu ku rumi'ad a mi'aca tu 'a'acaen aca; kanga'ayan ira ku matiniay "Masalafiiay a kalali'acaan".
S.PHON: miʦəɾəm to~u ko~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ. satapan to~u misiwfaj. aɾatək paɾiwar to~u sama`ama`anaj a ɬ~ɮafo~uŋ.ira ko~u riko~u, taka`ənan , tasaɾamaan kaħiɾaħiɾasan. o~u ka fa`əɬ~ɮətaj a kitakit o~u taɬ~ɮama`anaj a pisaɾamaan ko~unini. pisiwfaj a ɬ~ɮəmak ira ko~u to~usa a sasiɾo~uma : saka ʦəʦaj paɬ~ɮətəħan a misimsim ko~u pisiwfajan a maʦi`. no~uɾatə no~unijaħ a ɾo~uma. ħaʦa o~u miʦaɾiwwan a ɾo~umaʡ ħapisiwfajan. saɾafi`ifi`sa ko~u pi siwfaj. irasato~u pato~uŋaɾħan paʦafaj to~u kapaħaj no~u nijaɾo~u a mo~uno~u . saka to~usa i ʦəʦaj a ɾipaj aŋa misiwfaj. to~ura sakaənəm, sakapito~u no~u ɾipaj. mikiħamo~unaj a siwfaj a tamɬ~ɮaw masa`o~upo~u maɾaʦafaj mapo~uɾo~un ko~u tajaɾ saɾi- naxɾinaxsa ko~u nijaɾo~u a paɾiwaɾ ʦaŋra. saɾafiʡiaj a ma`ʦi i tija miʦəɾəm to~u ko~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ misatapan to~u pisiwfaj paɾiwar. kapaħanħan to~u ko~u matajaɾaj a tamɬ~ɮaw maɾaʦafaj to~u iɬ~ɮan no~uratək mapo~uɾo~un ko~u paɾo~u no~u ɾo~umaʡ ħakəɾo~unsa misaɾama miʡaʦa. o~u:rato~u paɾiwaɾ a ɬ~ɮafo~un kaħiɾaħiɾaan so~uto~u. no~u fa`inajan fafaħijan a rik`o~u,ko~uʦo~uʡ, fati, ʦaŋaw , sapi`ino~u`asikin ,taka`ənan,sakatajar a ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan,tasaɾama`an..... kaħiɾaħiɾasaʦa. i tini sa tajwan saɾafi`iaj a maʦi ħananaj a ɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u sama`ama`anaj a ɬ~ɮafo~un kaħiɾaħiɾasa`an ko~u paɾiwaran . o~u sijkaʦ` no~u tamɬ~ɮw. ʦo~uwa ka sasawaɬ~ɮən a pinaŋan ko~uni. masaɾafiiaj a kaɾaɾiʡaʦaan-** ʦəɾəm saħo~u ko~u~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ makakərəkrəm ko~u~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja, mararawrawto~u~u ko~u~u saɾawaʦan no~u~u maʦi , ʡaɾo~u~umanto~u~u ko~u~u miparajrajaj a pataɾa to~u~u sapaʡaʦa. paɾitmək a misiɾsiɾ to~u~u sapaʡaʦa no~u~u tirəŋ pajsaʡajaw. ira ko~u~u ʦipararaj, ira ko~u~u təɾi sanaj i sasra, ira ko~u~u i paɾiɬ~ɮiŋaj a maʦaʡit. nikawrira, mo~u~uəʦəɾ ko~u~u parajraj a masatisiɾ; kakaħaɬ~ɮ ko~u~u kasaɾaʡəɾaʡəɬ~ɮ naŋra, faŋʦaɾ ko~u~u karo~u~umakatan no~u~u ɾafaŋ. to~u~uʡəman sato~u~u sataəŋaɬ~ɮ sa ko~u~u simaɾ, matija o~u~u ro~u~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ko~u~u pinəŋnəŋ maħapi:naŋ, itijato~u~u ħaw i, naiʦo~u~uwaʦo~u~uwaaj a tamɬ~ɮaw maɾisafo~u~unto~u~u a tajni minəŋnəŋ to~u~u nafaɾo~u~uʦo~u~uʡan no~u~u tirəŋ ito~u~u paɾitmək.itini ʦaaj kapipaɬ~ɮətəŋ a mirikəʦ to~u~u karo~u~umakatan, pakaʡajaw kanʦa pakaiko~u~ur a misitapaŋ maʔmin a maŋaʡaj, pakawananto~u~u , pakawiɾito~u~u awa ko~u~u so~u~umo~u~uwaɾaj. nawħani, o~u~u ħanħaənaj aʦa ko~u~u pinaŋan to~u~u nano~u~u ʡajaʡajaw. saka ʡaʡəʦo~u~uʡəʦo~u~u sato~u~u, miʡisir to~u~u tatirəŋan rara ħan mito~u~uo~u~ur ko~u~u kaʡajawaj a ro~u~umakat. o~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u~u saka ira no~u~u pajso~u~u, awaən no~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw awa ko~u~u pajso~u~u, o~u~unian ko~u~u sakaʔʦa ka ɾato~u~uʡno~u~u matiniaj a tajaɾ, o~u~unian ko~u~u mito~u~ukaʡaj ʦaŋranan o~u~u mipaɾiwaɾaj. itini i tajʦiw, aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u~u miiŋiɬ~ɮaj to~u~u maʦi a o~u~umaħ, o~u~u pakaʔsəsaj a tamɬ~ɮaw i, paɾasawaɬ~ɮ ħan niŋraa ko~u~u ɾima fakʦiw no~u~u faʦaɾ a miʡamo~u~uto~u~u misapaənan, maɾo~u~u sapipatirəŋ to~u~u pisiwfajan to~u~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮajaaj; ʦiɾa sato~u~u, mapatirəŋto~u~u ko~u~u ɾawaɾawaʦ no~u~u sra niŋra to~u~u takarawaj ɾo~u~umaʡ, maɾəʦaɬ~ɮajto~u~u a maʦakat ko~u~u ʡaʦa no~u~u sra niŋra. kaʡinaɾan a minəŋnəŋ ko~u~u matiniaj a tajaɾ ħanto~u~u, nikawrira ʦima ko~u~u mafanaʡaj to~u~u ro~u~uraj naŋra ħakija. ʦaħo~u kapiʦəɾəm ko~u~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ misakimo~u~ukimo~u~ur ito~u~u, mao~u~upo~u~uħ miparajraj to~u~uɬ~ɮafo~u~uŋ a mipataɾa to~u~u ɾafaŋ; ja ħinataɾa to~u~u sakairaaw ato~u~u miʡəmʡəm to~u~u sakafo~u~utiʡaw, taħira i ɾafii to~u~usa ko~u~u to~u~uki; ta no~u~ukaj sa mafo~u~utiʡ. ano~u~u pararirsa i ŋata no~u~u ɾo~u~umaʡ ko~u~u paʡaʦaan maŋaʡajħo~u, mafaɾiʦ to~u~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮajaɬ~ɮaja ko~u~u pipaʡaʦaan,aɾatək fəsiwsa tajra i siŋʦiko~u~u ,ɾafii patiko~u~uɾ mino~u~ukaj tajni tao~u~uʦiw. ʦaaj ka ʦifaɾo~u~uʦo~u~uʡ ato~u~u ʦaaj pakaħaɬ~ɮiɬ~ɮi a tamɬ~ɮaw taŋso~u~uɾto~u~u misawaɬ~ɮ to~u~u matiniaj a tajaɾ. ɬ~ɮəŋan o~u~u ʡo~u~uraɬ~ɮ ko~u~u mamitənaʡ to~u~u faɾo~u~uʦo~u~uʡ naŋra, o~u~u misaɾinaɾinaħaj a siwfaj ko~u~uninian. aɬ~ɮiħaj i to~ukaj ko~u~u misiwfajaj, ira ko~u~u no~u~u tirəŋ a ɾo~u~umaʡira ko~u~u miʦaɾiwan a ɾo~u~umaʡto~u~u maɾo~u~u tijam . maro~u~uʡaj to~u~uja ʦʦaj a ɾaɾan, maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u~u kasaso~u~uwaɾ naŋra a taħira i ɾafii ko~u~u pisiwfaj; pato~u~uŋaɾ ħan no~u~u i ɾaɾanaj miparajraj, ma:ŋaɾəf ko~u~u kaʡaɾo~u~uman no~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw a mirao~u~ur. ro~u~uma, ira ko~u~u pataɬ~ɮo~u~uan no~u~u ʦənfo~u~u ko~u~u pisaɾamaan a kaɾaɾiʡaʦaan to~u~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja, ʦaɾiw ħan no~u~u ʡaɾo~u~umanaj; nika o~u~u faʦo~u~u niŋra ʦaaj ka sasiro~u~uma to~u~una miso~u~uwaɾan to~u~u i kaʡajawaj. tapaɾ ħan a minaŋnəŋ ko~u~u paʡaʦaan no~u~u matiniaj a pisiwfaj i, masaɾaɾəko~u~uan itini i ʡo~u~urip ita to~u~u ro~u~umiʡamiʡaɬ~ɮ. o~u~u ʦaʡɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ, kakaənən, sakiɾo~u~umaʡato~u~u masamaamaanaj a sasaɾamaən makajrajra itini, ano~u~u awawaaj i , paɾatawa ħanto~u~u paso~u~uwaɾ "iɬ~ɮaħi to~u~u nika awa"! nawħani, aniniaj a pisijakajan i, taɬ~ɮa awaajto~u~u ko~u~u ro~u~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a miʡaʦa to~u~u ʡaʡaʦaən aʦa; kaŋaʡajan ira ko~u~u matiniaj "masaɾafiiaj a kaɾaɾiʡaʦaan".
